notes: Top 50 clinically relevant pseudogene pairs. Processed pseudogenes with high sequence homology are the primary source of NGS false positives.

VWF.notes: Processed pseudogene on chr1. High sequence homology with exons 23-34. Common VAF artifact (observed ~13-30% instead of 50%).

GUSB.notes: Multiple processed pseudogenes. GUSBP1 on chr5 is the most clinically relevant.

PMS2.notes: PMS2CL on chr7 is a cross-chromosomal processed pseudogene. Major clinical pitfall in Lynch syndrome testing.

CFC1.notes: Processed pseudogene. Congenital heart disease gene. CFC1B can cause false heterozygous calls.

SMN1.notes: SMN2 is a functional backup copy with >99.9% homology. Not a pseudogene but causes frequent misalignment. Special handling required.

CYP2D6.notes: CYP2D7 is a non-functional pseudogene with high homology. Major source of pharmacogenomic false calls.

HBA1.notes: HBA1 and HBA2 are both functional but share >95% homology. Variants are often misassigned between the two copies.

HBA2.notes: Bidirectional misassignment with HBA1 due to high homology.

HBB.notes: HBD (delta-hemoglobin) is functional but shares significant homology with HBB. Can cause variant misassignment.

AR.notes: AR-V7 is a splice variant not a pseudogene. No processed pseudogene known, but homologous regions exist.

DMD.notes: DMD has multiple pseudogene-like regions due to its large size. Caution advised for exonic variants.

BRCA1.notes: No major processed pseudogene, but pseudogene-like regions on chr17 can cause artifacts. VAF checking recommended.

BRCA2.notes: No major processed pseudogene. Rare alignment artifacts from homologous regions.

CFTR.notes: No major processed pseudogene. Standard VAF checks apply.

COL3A1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

F8.notes: F8A1 is a processed pseudogene. Known source of false positives in hemophilia A testing.

F9.notes: No major processed pseudogene. Standard VAF checks.

LDLR.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

PAH.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

PTEN.notes: PTENP1 is a well-characterized processed pseudogene. Can cause false positive LOF calls.

RB1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

TSC1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

TSC2.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

VHL.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

WT1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

ATM.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. Large gene, alignment artifacts possible.

MSH2.notes: MSH2 has pseudogene-related artifacts. Careful validation needed for Lynch syndrome testing.

MLH1.notes: MLH1 pseudogene on chr3. Known source of false positives in Lynch testing.

MSH6.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

PMS1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

STK11.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

CDH1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

CDK4.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

TP53.notes: No processed pseudogene. Very rare alignment artifacts from homologous regions.

APC.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

MEN1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

NF1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. Large gene, alignment artifacts possible.

NF2.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

SDHA.notes: SDHAP1 and SDHAP2 are processed pseudogenes of SDHA (not SDHB/C/D). Major pitfall in paraganglioma testing.

POLG.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

ACADM.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

ACADVL.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

CPT1A.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

SLC25A13.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

SLC22A5.notes: SLC22A5 has known pseudogene-related artifacts in carnitine deficiency testing.

FKRP.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

FKTN.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

POMGNT1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

POMT1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening.

GBA.notes: GBAP1 on chr1 is a processed pseudogene with high homology. Major source of false positives in Gaucher disease testing.

SETBP1.notes: No confirmed processed pseudogene. VAF-based screening. SETBP1 mutations are in DGRA Tier 1 as homozygous LOF.
